You should have Grade E / Level 2 / “Attained” or above in 5 subjects of HKCEE / HKDSE with at least 1 year’s experience, preferably gained in customer service related industries. Good command of spoken and written English and Chinese, customer-centric mindset with effective and empathetic communication skills are required, whilst Putonghua or other language ability is an advantage. You are required to perform shift duties on irregular patterns. A valid Hong Kong driving licence class 1 is mandatory for Train Captain-Light Rail position.
